docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF HELEN KONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDREW VENTURI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT ON 09/26/18 ORDERED DESTROYED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED JUL-27-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VENTURI, ANDREW
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY KONG, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT VENTURI, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2018 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONG, HELEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VENTURI, ANDREW $0. THE PLUMBER LETTER DEMONSTRATES THAT THE CLOG CANNOT BE ATTRIBUTED TO ANY PARTICULAR UNIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
